channel.title: AI & Tech News Aggregator
channel.description: Aggregated AI and Tech news from 11 sources

item.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX files to go public, shooting for record stock offering: Sources
item.description: [Straits Times] Listing could raise as much as US$75 billion, eclipsing Saudi Aramco as world’s biggest IPO.

item.title: 【钛晨报】中国人民银行等四部门：推动金融资源更加精准投向科技创新领域；OpenClaw又更新，直接接入QQ Bot官方插件；国航、厦航、中联航等多家航司发布公告，上调国内燃油附加费
item.description: [钛媒体] 联想杨元庆：两年后营收冲刺1000亿美元，将探索更多AI原生设备；康师傅饮品、锦江酒店等12家头部企业推出无限Token计划；史上最严充电宝新规2027年4月实施，多电芯企业通过摸底测试；美国纽约市宣布撤销政府设备使用TikTok禁令；微软计划在2029年底前在新加坡人工智能领域投资55亿美元；特斯拉正式停产Model S和Model X两款车型；中国将开展基层医疗质量改善三年行动

item.title: Exclusive-Intel looks to put millions more into SambaNova startup chaired by CEO Tan
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX moves to become a publicly traded company
item.description: [BBC Technology] The company’s public stock debut is set to be one of the most valuable in history, and could make Musk the world's first trillionaire.

item.title: Anthropic took down thousands of GitHub repos trying to yank its leaked source code — a move the company says was an accident
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Anthropic executives said it was an accident and retracted the bulk of the takedown notices.

item.title: WhatsApp says Italian surveillance company tricked around 200 users into downloading spyware
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Meta’s natural gas binge could power South Dakota
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Meta's upcoming Hyperion AI data center will be powered by 10 new natural gas plants.

item.title: Analysis:SpaceX’s orbital data centers could face same hurdles as Microsoft’s abandoned undersea project
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: AI Models Lie, Cheat, and Steal to Protect Other Models From Being Deleted
item.description: [WIRED AI] A new study from researchers at UC Berkeley and UC Santa Cruz suggests models will disobey human commands to protect their own kind.

item.title: Related Digital nears $16 billion financing for Oracle data center, source says
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: ‘Thank You for Generating With Us!’ Hollywood's AI Acolytes Stay on the Hype Train
item.description: [WIRED AI] Star Wars producer Kathleen Kennedy was one of the few skeptics at the Runway AI Summit, where AI was compared to fire and the printing press just a week after Sora’s death.

item.title: Peppa Pig and Transformers owner Hasbro hit by cyber-attack
item.description: [BBC Technology] The firm says its operations remain open but says the hack "may result in some delays".

item.title: Cognichip wants AI to design the chips that power AI, and just raised $60M to try
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] The firm says it can reduce the cost of chip development by more than 75% and cut the timeline by more than half.

item.title: DHL unit retrenches workers in Singapore; company and union decline to give details
item.description: [Straits Times] DHL Global Forwarding Singapore is a division under DHL Group that offers international freight forwarding services.

item.title: Less than a month: StrictlyVC San Francisco brings leaders from TDK Ventures, Replit, and more together
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] StrictlyVC San Francisco brings leaders from TDK Ventures, Replit, and more together on April 30. Space is limited. Register here for your pass.

item.title: The real impact of AI on budgets, stacks and teams
item.description: [MarTech] AI is replacing tools and reshaping budgets, but it’s also expanding stacks and increasing headcount. The post The real impact of AI on budgets, stacks and teams appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: AI can push your Stream Deck buttons for you
item.description: [The Verge AI] If you're tired of controlling Stream Deck devices by manually pushing buttons, then good news: Elgato will now let you delegate that task to a chatbot instead. The Stream Deck 7.4 software update released today introduces Model Context Protocol (MCP) support, allowing AI assistants like Claude, Cha

item.title: Agentic AI discovery requires machine-readable brands
item.description: [MarTech] Drive better visibility and outcomes in AI search by making your brand easier for machines to interpret, connect and act on. The post Agentic AI discovery requires machine-readable brands appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: 小牛电动胡依林：一家成立12年的两轮电动车厂商决定转型AI，“all in or nothing”
item.description: [36氪] 文｜邱晓芬 编辑｜苏建勋 一家成立12年的两轮电动车厂商，在成功经历过中国的锂电化、智能化浪潮，并在纳斯达克上市后，决定加入AI时代全新的竞争。造AI时代的智能两轮电动车——被小牛电动称为：“下一个十年的护城河”。 在小牛电动不久前的发布会上，他们展示了初步的成果——在新发布的电动车NXT2和NX2上，搭载了自研的小牛灵犀AIOS、以及首个面向骑行的AI智能体。 当你开车上路时，小牛灵犀AIOS和智能体的搭配，将让你的电动车变成“会看路、懂说话”的骑行伙伴。 举个例子，当你在雨天转弯时，AI会识别到骑行状态，并自动开启防侧滑功能；你也可以让它“找附近人少的咖啡店”，电动车能

item.title: Salesforce turns Slack into the front end for enterprise AI
item.description: [MarTech] New Slackbot capabilities hope to connect conversations, data and actions, making Slack the interface where AI-driven work actually gets done. The post Salesforce turns Slack into the front end for enterprise AI appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: 告别粗放增长！证券投顾行业迎来“合规+专业”新时代
item.description: [钛媒体] 在监管加强和市场成熟的双重推动下，证券投顾行业正在告别粗放增长，通过坚守合规底线、深耕专业能力和借助科技赋能，迈向以专业服务与长期价值为导向的高质量发展新阶段。

item.title: Singapore stocks rebound on optimism over Iran war resolution; STI up 1.8%
item.description: [Straits Times] The STI was up 90.38 points at 4,975.83, tracking regional gains.

item.title: BioNTech to wind up Singapore vaccine manufacturing plant by early 2027
item.description: [Straits Times] The German biotechnology firm said it currently has 85 staff at the Singapore site.

item.title: Claude Code users hitting usage limits 'way faster than expected'
item.description: [BBC Technology] Anthropic, the company behind the AI coding assistant, said it was fixing a problem blocking users.

item.title: Mass robotaxi malfunction halts traffic in Chinese city
item.description: [BBC Technology] Baidu has not responded to a request for comment about the outage, which affected at least 100 cars.

item.title: “少爷兵”腾讯，被AI揪出空调房
item.description: [钛媒体] 也许不擅长，但不得不做。

item.title: 2026有智青年挑战赛，报名通道全面开启！
item.description: [36氪] 这不是一场传统比赛，是一次对话。 我们始终相信，AI 的使命不应是取代人类，而是帮助人类变得更强大。因此在这次选拔中，我们不会关注你的教育背景、融资规模或是使用了多么前沿的算法，唯一在意的是你的产品是否真正让个体变得更强。 行至决赛，你会站上WAVES的舞台，这是中国创投圈最重要的舞台之一，台下坐着投资人、产业伙伴、未来的用户，过去很多你叫得出名字的创业者，都是从这里被看见、被理解、被加速。2026年夏天，我们想把这个舞台分你一半。 大赛报名已开启，欢迎所有年轻实干家报名，等你来定义下一个—商业坐标！   Part01- 赛道划分 赛道一：智能体——"第二大脑

item.title: Baidu’s robotaxis froze in traffic, creating chaos
item.description: [The Verge AI] Numerous robotaxis operated by Chinese tech giant Baidu froze in a major city on Tuesday, reportedly trapping passengers inside, stranding them on highways, and causing at least one accident in snarled traffic. Police in Wuhan confirmed receiving multiple reports of Baidu's Apollo Go robotaxis stopp

item.title: I Watched a 7.5-Hour Movie in Theaters to Confront My Dwindling Attention Span
item.description: [WIRED AI] Sátántango is considered a holy rite for hardcore cinephiles. In a packed screening with no cellphones in sight, it also offered a salve for brain rot.

item.title: 对话周亚辉：“一人公司”火爆，企业级Agent才是金矿
item.description: [钛媒体] 传统SaaS正在被AI侵蚀，新一代Agent未出现绝对赢家，这可能是未来几年最大机会。

item.title: 氪星晚报｜特斯拉正式停产Model S和Model X两款车型；马斯克：FSD 14.3版本预计将于本周末发布；阿里发布Wan2.7-Image
item.description: [36氪] 大公司： 李亚鹏名下公司成立麋鹿咖啡公司 36氪获悉，爱企查App显示，近日，云南麋鹿咖啡有限公司成立，法定代表人为杨凝，注册资本100万元人民币，经营范围包括咖啡豆种植、食用农产品批发、食用农产品零售、食品互联网销售等。股权穿透图显示，该公司由李亚鹏名下北京艺莲文化科技有限公司、罗毓藻分别持股90%、10%。 特斯拉正式停产Model S和Model X两款车型 据媒体报道，马斯克4月1日在X平台发文，宣布特斯拉正式停产Model S和Model X两款车型，目前已停止接受新车定制订单，消费者只能购买库存现车。此前马斯克表示，将在弗里蒙特工厂生产Optimus人形机器人，Mo

item.title: 王兴再次为美团AI吹响“进攻”号角
item.description: [钛媒体] 美团会安然进入“舒适圈”吗？

item.title: 宇树科技IPO：一个“跛脚”的领跑者？
item.description: [钛媒体] 招股书太“反常识”了

item.title: I Asked ChatGPT What WIRED’s Reviewers Recommend. Its Answers Were All Wrong
item.description: [WIRED AI] Want to know what our reviewers have actually tested and picked as the best TVs, headphones, and laptops? Ask ChatGPT, and it'll give you the wrong answers.

item.title: 2026中国股权投资行业名册，调研启动！
item.description: [36氪] 36氪创投研究院的朋友们： 新春好！ 2026的整个春天，创投圈显得格外忙碌：大家或许在养虾、参加龙虾活动；或许在钻研技术、敲代码；或许在寻觅并肩作战的队友；亦或不断在各个AI APP中反复横跳....现在正是AI春暖花开之时，暗涌Waves的2026年度调研规划也随之官宣！ 2025过去一年，我们见证了AI从实验室的静默代码，破土成为改变产业底座的显学。暗涌发布了96篇文章，不断追踪报道一级市场事件，记录了国资/产业投资机构的强势入场，陪伴AI从"概念验证"走向"商业闭环"的每一个关键节点。 今年，我们将继续追踪正在发生的事情、和新崛起的人群。正如我们的Slogan：“钱的流

item.title: 四个大脑、三条路线、一种「天真」｜36氪离线聚会第零期
item.description: [36氪] 现场拍摄 文 | 阿至 我们似乎比以往任何时候都更相信技术本身的力量。 过去3年，在这场由AI所掀起的创业浪潮中，技术正以前所未有的速度，被赋予创造一切、解决一切的宏大叙事。参数在迭代，估值在飙升，钱的流动此起彼伏。 然而在这种高速的，甚至有些喧嚣的确定性之外，那些勇敢做出选择、推动改变发生的、具体的人，才是创造变革的原点。 基于这一原点，我们组织了一场「离线聚会」。作为36氪全新的超轻量线下沙龙IP，我们想做一次尝试，不要路演话术和商业互吹，创造一个让分享和对话不被审视的空间，记录那些未经修饰的直觉、未被折叠的想象、以及尚未达成共识却值得被听见的声音。

item.title: Thousands lose their jobs in deep cuts at tech giant Oracle
item.description: [BBC Technology] It is thought that thousands of people may have lost their jobs at Oracle, one of the world's largest tech companies.

item.title: Asia’s factory activity slows on cost pressure from Iran war
item.description: [Straits Times] South Korea was an outlier, with factory activity expanding in March, led by semiconductor demand and product launches.

item.title: 36氪首发 | 半导体设备老兵创业晶圆键合公司，元禾璞华领投新一轮融资
item.description: [36氪] 作者 | 乔钰杰 编辑 | 袁斯来 硬氪获悉，今日，矽赫微科技（上海）有限公司（以下简称“SHW”）宣布完成新一轮融资，由元禾璞华领投，合肥产投、哇牛资本、君子兰资本、萨珊资本、曦晨资本、苏高新、东方嘉富以及江苏大摩半导体等众多知名投资机构和产业方投资。 SHW成立于2023年，总部位于上海，是一家聚焦晶圆永久键合技术及设备的半导体装备企业。公司致力于为先进封装、化合物半导体及新型衬底制造等领域提供高精度晶圆键合设备与配套解决方案。 团队方面，公司创始人王笑寒博士在美国留学和工作多年后回国创业，长期从事半导体设备研发，是国内该领域的开创性

item.title: Former Cathay Cineplexes operator mm2 Asia fails in $14 million fund-raising plan
item.description: [Straits Times] If the plan had succeeded, $7.5 million was to be used for the repayment of debts and liabilities.

item.title: Mercor says it was hit by cyberattack tied to compromise of open source LiteLLM project
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] The AI recruiting startup confirmed a security incident after an extortion hacking crew took credit for stealing data from the company's systems.

item.title: Anthropic is having a month
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] A human really borks things at Anthropic for the second time this week.

item.title: Claude Code leak exposes a Tamagotchi-style ‘pet’ and an always-on agent
item.description: [The Verge AI] After Anthropic released Claude Code's 2.1.88 update, users quickly discovered that it contained a package with a source map file containing its TypeScript codebase, with one person on X calling attention to the leak and posting a file containing the code. The leaked data reportedly contains more th

item.title: You can now use ChatGPT with Apple’s CarPlay
item.description: [The Verge AI] ChatGPT is now accessible from your CarPlay dashboard if you have iOS 26.4 or newer and the latest version of the ChatGPT app, 9to5Mac reports. Apple's recently launched iOS 26.4 update added support for "voice-based conversational apps" in CarPlay, opening the door to let you use AI chatbots with v

item.title: The Galaxy S26’s photo app can sloppify your memories
item.description: [The Verge AI] The Google Pixel 9 walked so that the Samsung Galaxy S26 could run. Google introduced AI editing tools to Photos slowly. It started with changes to the background - make the sky more blue, or remove crowds of tourists. Things got weird once the company added natural language requests and let you ask

item.title: Art schools are being torn apart by AI
item.description: [The Verge AI] When my baby brother, a 3D modelling and animation student, talks to me about his projects and studies, the pride I usually feel is becoming increasingly tainted by a growing sense of dread. As a creative professional and former design student myself, I understand all too well how fierce the competi

item.title: AI Has Flooded All the Weather Apps
item.description: [WIRED AI] Weather forecasting has gotten a big boost from machine learning. How that translates into what users see can vary.

item.title: Building an AI competitive edge through strategy and governance
item.description: [MarTech] AI can produce content at scale, but not direction. Better inputs, proprietary data and clear guardrails drive stronger outcomes. The post Building an AI competitive edge through strategy and governance appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Tech CEOs suddenly love blaming AI for mass job cuts. Why?
item.description: [BBC Technology] More tech leaders are pointing to job cuts caused by AI tools - and a need for more investment cash.

item.title: Singapore’s deep-tech push requires ‘calculated bets’, stronger ecosystem: NUS Enterprise’s Benjamin Tee
item.description: [Business Times] Such ventures are not about moving from ‘zero to one’, but about scaling breakthroughs to impact millions, he says

item.title: The truth about martech in 2026
item.description: [MarTech] AI is exposing what your martech stack can’t hide. In 2026, teams without the skills and processes to support it won’t be able to prove ROI. The post The truth about martech in 2026 appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: The hidden tradeoffs in moving to a composable martech stack
item.description: [MarTech] Best-of-breed stacks promise agility, but the real impact on speed and cost depends on how well teams manage integration, data and operational complexity. The post The hidden tradeoffs in moving to a composable martech stack appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: The IRS Wants Smarter Audits. Palantir Could Help Decide Who Gets Flagged
item.description: [WIRED AI] Documents show the tax agency is testing a Palantir tool to surface “highest-value” audit and investigation targets from a maze of legacy systems.

item.title: This time it’s different: LaunchPad @ one-north’s next act signals a maturing startup ecosystem
item.description: [Business Times] The next iteration of it may be more structured and more technologically advanced

item.title: Why the Mac Mini is out of stock: A look at Singapore’s OpenClaw buzz
item.description: [Business Times] A new AI agent has taken the world by storm. Is this a new hype cycle or the start of a tech...
